message:
feat(raptorq): add RaptorQ encoding pipeline module

Introduce the raptorq module providing the core encoding pipeline
for the RaptorQ fountain code integration:

- mod.rs: module declaration and public re-exports
- builder.rs: fluent builder API for constructing encoding parameters
  (symbol size, source block count, repair overhead ratio)
- pipeline.rs: streaming encoding pipeline that processes source data
  through RaptorQ systematic encoding, producing both source and
  repair symbols for transmission
- tests.rs: unit tests covering builder validation, pipeline
  round-trip encoding/decoding, and edge cases (zero-length input,
  maximum symbol counts)

Wire the raptorq module into src/lib.rs as a public crate export.

This provides the foundation for all symbol-native encoding
operations used by the distributed and migration layers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+//! RaptorQ integration layer.
+//!
+//! This module wires together the encoding, decoding, transport, security,
+//! and observability subsystems into cohesive sender/receiver pipelines.
+//!
+//! # Architecture
+//!
+//! ```text
+//! Application
+//!     │
+//!     ▼
+//! RaptorQSender / RaptorQReceiver   ← this module
+//!     │                 │
+//!     ▼                 ▼
+//! EncodingPipeline  DecodingPipeline  (src/encoding.rs, src/decoding.rs)
+//!     │                 │
+//!     ▼                 ▼
+//! SecurityContext    SecurityContext    (src/security/)
+//!     │                 │
+//!     ▼                 ▼
+//! SymbolSink         SymbolStream      (src/transport/)
+//! ```
+
+pub mod builder;
+pub mod pipeline;
+
+pub use builder::{RaptorQReceiverBuilder, RaptorQSenderBuilder};
+pub use pipeline::{RaptorQReceiver, RaptorQSender, ReceiveOutcome, SendOutcome, SendProgress};
+
+#[cfg(test)]
+mod tests;
